title: Scope validation, architecture lock, and scaffold

stack_locked.frontend: Vue 3 + TypeScript + Vite + Pinia + Vue Router + Element Plus
stack_locked.backend: Node.js 18 LTS + Express + TypeScript + Prisma + Socket.IO + BullMQ

decisions: All runtime dependencies containerized — zero host-machine tools required
Self-signed TLS certs generated at first boot via gen-certs.sh / nginx entrypoint
Docker secrets for encryption_key, db_password, jwt_secret — never in env files
Prisma ORM chosen for type-safe MySQL schema + migration management
AES-256-GCM encryption for stored value balances and audit log entries
HMAC-SHA256 API signing for hardware/carrier integrations
Field-level PII masking applied in serialization layer per role
Idempotency middleware: Redis-cached, 24h TTL, UUIDv4 key required on mutating endpoints
Rate limiting: 100/min global, 20/min auth — Redis-backed sliding window
Circuit breakers (opossum) wrapping all carrier adapter calls
Perceptual hash duplicate detection: Hamming distance threshold = 10
1 coupon per fulfillment request max; member-tier discount applied first
Stored value is a system-wide feature flag (not per-student opt-in)
next_prompt: Prompt 2 — Database schema finalization, Prisma migrations, seeders, and backend server bootstrap
